events.name: New York Knicks at Orlando Magic

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson scored at least 30 points for the fourth consecutive game, his season-high 40 leading the Knicks past the Orlando Magic 132-120 on Saturday and putting New York in the NBA Cup final.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Brunson's season-high 40 points lead Knicks past Magic to NBA Cup final

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama returned from a 12-game absence with 22 points and nine rebounds, giving San Antonio a surge and the Oklahoma City Thunder just its second loss with the 111-109 victory Saturday night putting the Spurs in the NBA Cup final.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama's return lifts Spurs to NBA Cup final, handing Thunder just 2nd loss
